curation.synopsis: In the ash-choked aftermath of the Dropsite Massacre, the killing fields of Isstvan V are silent except for the carrion-feeders and the traitor patrols hunting survivors. Ra'stan and Usabius of the Salamanders crawl from the rubble and refuse to flee with the other survivors. Their primarch Vulkan is missing, presumed dead, and they will not leave the planet without his body — or a sign of his fate. Across the Urgall Depression they stalk Word Bearers and Night Lords picket forces, ambushing the murderers of their brothers for every yard of ground. What they discover in the ruins is older and stranger than any of them imagined, and the phrase that will become a creed — Vulkan Lives — is first spoken here, between two soldiers who have lost everything but their oath.
